base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_ice_beam — a pickup_item from 1986 metroid. Ice Beam — replaces Power Beam. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ice Beam — replaces Power Beam; required to freeze Metroids
